known_issues: Sound playback not working in the app

existing_features.title: Fix the background music (BGM) so it reliably starts playing when the user enters the Dashboard page. Ensure the useBGM hook correctly loads and plays the audio file, handles autoplay policy by resuming on first user interaction, and that the FloatingMusicControl component reflects the correct play/pause state.

Fix the click/tap sound effects so they play on every user interaction across all pages. The useDoubleKnockSound hook (used in RootLayout) and any page-specific sounds (e.g., hello sound in ChatPage, unlock sound in LockScreen, OurMemoriesPage audio) must correctly load their audio files, respect browser autoplay restrictions by triggering only on user gesture, and not throw errors when audio is unavailable.

Audit all audio file references across hooks and pages (useBGM.ts, useDoubleKnockSound.ts, useClickSound.ts, ChatPage.tsx, LockScreen.tsx, OurMemoriesPage.tsx) and ensure every referenced audio file exists in the correct public assets directory. Replace any missing or broken audio files with working alternatives or synthesize sounds via the Web Audio API where appropriate.

projectName: Fix sound playback — BGM and click/tap sounds not playing
